commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of a new hook/API contract, not a narrow repair that automation can safely perform.; Cleared: The diff does not add dependencies, workflow execution, secret handling, network calls, or broader permission access; the remaining concerns are API/proof/session-timing risks rather than concrete security defe... (sha=fc972dfdba946b286eb571ea1f4be4f85734ec97)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds documented `agent:turn:end` and `agent:turn:save` ACP internal hook events, adds save-outcome callback/types to `AcpSessionManager`, moves direct and dispatch ACP transcript persistence into the awaited save callback, and updates focused tests.

PR surface: Source +332, Tests +881, Docs +9. Total +1222 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR adding a new hook/API surface, not a bug report with a current-main failure to reproduce. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the requested hook symbols.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of a new hook/API contract, not a narrow repair that automation can safely perform.

target.title: feat(hooks): add agent:turn:end and agent:turn:save internal hook events
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds two ACP turn internal hook events:
  - `agent:turn:end` for ACP runtime turn completion or failure.
  - `agent:turn:save` for the save-layer outcome after transcript persistence is saved, skipped, or fails.
- Wires dispatch-backed ACP turns and direct ACP command turns through the awaited save callback before reporting the save outcome.
- Adds `context.saveOutcome` (`saved`, `skipped`, `failed`) and optional `context.saveSkipReason`; `context.success` is true only when `saveOutcome === "saved"`.
- Validates structured save callback results and reports malformed results as failed save outcomes.
- Tracks actual transcript append evidence so blocked/no-op writes report `skipped` instead of `saved`.
- Documents the split contract and covers manager, dispatch, direct command, persistence, and type-guard paths with focused tests.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [x] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #37833
- Related #60734

## Behavior Changes

Internal hook consumers can subscribe to two ACP turn boundaries:

| Event | Fires when | Durable turn data readable |
|---|---|---|
| `agent:turn:end` | ACP runtime turn completes or fails after terminal event delivery | No |
| `agent:turn:save` | ACP save phase reaches an outcome | Yes, when `context.saveOutcome === "saved"` |

`agent:turn:end` carries `sessionKey`, `success`, `durationMs`, and optional `errorCode`.

`agent:turn:save` carries `sessionKey`, `success`, `saveOutcome`, `turnSuccess`, `durationMs`, optional `turnErrorCode`, optional `saveError`, and optional `saveSkipReason`.

No user-facing messaging or config behavior changes.

## Security Impact

- New permissions/capabilities? `No`
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? `No`
- New/changed network calls? `No`
- Command/tool execution surface changed? `No`
- Data access scope changed? `No`

## Verification

Commands run on head `fc972dfdba`:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts
pnpm check:test-types
pnpm exec oxlint src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-transcript.runtime.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-transcript.runtime.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
git diff --check
```

Result:

```text
5 Vitest shards passed: manager, hooks, ACP transcript persistence, direct ACP command, dispatch ACP, dispatch-from-config, ACP live-model-switch command
Test type check passed
Touched-file oxlint passed
Touched-file formatting check passed
git diff --check passed
```

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed**: ACP save readiness is now reported only after the awaited save callback returns an explicit validated outcome. Direct ACP and dispatch ACP transcript persistence run inside that callback, so `saveOutcome: "saved"` means the application-level transcript append path completed or confirmed persisted content; `skipped` and `failed` are reported separately.
- **Real paths covered**: Production `AcpSessionManager.runTurn`, production internal hook registry, direct ACP command transcript callback, dispatch ACP transcript callback, ACP transcript persistence helper, before-message-write blocked write behavior, and the `agent:turn:save` type guard.
- **Committed proof**: Focused tests exercise manager event ordering, malformed save result handling, save-outcome invariant validation, direct-command and dispatch save callbacks, and blocked/no-op transcript writes before a successful save outcome is observed.
- **What was not tested**: A networked external `acpx` adapter process.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? `Yes`
- Config/env changes? `No`
- Migration needed? `No`

## Failure Recovery

Revert this PR to remove the new internal hook events and return ACP turn completion to stats-only behavior.

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: Consumers may confuse runtime completion with durable transcript readiness.
- Mitigation: Separate `agent:turn:end` from `agent:turn:save`, with `saveOutcome` identifying `saved`, `skipped`, or `failed`.
- Risk: Slow transcript persistence could delay ACP cleanup.
- Mitigation: Only the save callback is awaited for the save boundary; hook handlers still use bounded fire-and-forget execution.
target.author: mantisai-bot
